relationships.relationship_description: Google TPU upside drives demand for Broadcom's AI products.
relationships.original_sentence: Broadcom is set to report Jan quarter (F1Q26) earnings Wednesday, and we continue to see a strong demand profile for its AI products driven by Google TPU upside, AI networking strength.

relationships.relationship_description: Google’s TPU 3nm (Ironwood) ASIC chip drives AI revenues for Broadcom.
relationships.original_sentence: For the Jan quarter, we expect AI revenues to exceed $9B (vs. consensus of $8.1B), driven by continued upside from Google’s TPU 3nm (Ironwood) ASIC chip and strong demand for networking (Tomahawk 5 and initial ramp of Tomahawk 6 switching chips).

relationships.relationship_description: Sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs contribute to Broadcom's AI revenues.
relationships.original_sentence: We estimate AI revenues of $10-11B+ for the April quarter (vs. consensus of $8.96B), supported by robust demand in AI networking, the ongoing ramp of the TPU 3nm Ironwood program, sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs, and early shipments to OpenAI and Softbank/ARM 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.

relationships.relationship_description: Sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs contribute to Broadcom's AI revenues.
relationships.original_sentence: We estimate AI revenues of $10-11B+ for the April quarter (vs. consensus of $8.96B), supported by robust demand in AI networking, the ongoing ramp of the TPU 3nm Ironwood program, sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs, and early shipments to OpenAI and Softbank/ARM 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.

relationships.relationship_description: Early shipments to OpenAI for 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.
relationships.original_sentence: We estimate AI revenues of $10-11B+ for the April quarter (vs. consensus of $8.96B), supported by robust demand in AI networking, the ongoing ramp of the TPU 3nm Ironwood program, sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs, and early shipments to OpenAI and Softbank/ARM 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.

relationships.relationship_description: Early shipments to Softbank/ARM for 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.
relationships.original_sentence: We estimate AI revenues of $10-11B+ for the April quarter (vs. consensus of $8.96B), supported by robust demand in AI networking, the ongoing ramp of the TPU 3nm Ironwood program, sustained Meta MTIA/ByteDance ASIC programs, and early shipments to OpenAI and Softbank/ARM 1st gen ASIC XPU programs.

relationships.relationship_description: New programs with SoftBank/ARM for 2nm/3nm ASICs.
relationships.original_sentence: In total, we expect Broadcom to generate >$65B+ in AI revenues in FY26 and >$120B in FY27 as new products and programs ramp, including increased shipments of the current generation TPU 3nm Ironwood, the start of the TPU v8 (Sunfish) 3nm ramp, and new programs with SoftBank/ARM, OpenAI 2nm/3nm ASICs, and Anthropic.

relationships.relationship_description: New programs with OpenAI for 2nm/3nm ASICs.
relationships.original_sentence: In total, we expect Broadcom to generate >$65B+ in AI revenues in FY26 and >$120B in FY27 as new products and programs ramp, including increased shipments of the current generation TPU 3nm Ironwood, the start of the TPU v8 (Sunfish) 3nm ramp, and new programs with SoftBank/ARM, OpenAI 2nm/3nm ASICs, and Anthropic.

relationships.relationship_description: New programs with Anthropic.
relationships.original_sentence: In total, we expect Broadcom to generate >$65B+ in AI revenues in FY26 and >$120B in FY27 as new products and programs ramp, including increased shipments of the current generation TPU 3nm Ironwood, the start of the TPU v8 (Sunfish) 3nm ramp, and new programs with SoftBank/ARM, OpenAI 2nm/3nm ASICs, and Anthropic.

relationships.relationship_description: Google drives TPU units, which are powered by Broadcom's ASICs.
relationships.quantifier: 3.5M TPU units this year and 6–7M TPU processors in CY27
relationships.original_sentence: As we have recently written (see note here), we believe Google is set to drive 3.5M TPU units this year and 6–7M TPU processors in CY27, given their increasing success at supporting external customer AI workloads.

relationships.relationship_description: Broadcom and Google jointly power next-gen 3nm TPU ASICs for external customer AI workloads.
relationships.original_sentence: For FY27, we believe a majority of TPU shipments will support external customer AI workloads, all powered by Broadcom’s/Google’s next-gen 3nm TPU ASIC.

relationships.relationship_description: Meta's current gen programs (Athena, Iris, Arke) drive ASIC revenues for Broadcom.
relationships.quantifier: $5–$6B in ASIC revenues this year and next
relationships.original_sentence: For Meta, we acknowledge some changes on future-gen programs (2nm Olympus, targeted for CY28 ramp) but continue to see current gen programs (Athena, Iris, Arke) driving $5–$6B in ASIC revenues this year and next and the overall commitment to ASICs/Broadcom remains high at Meta.

relationships.relationship_description: Part of Broadcom’s diverse ASIC customer base.
relationships.original_sentence: The diversity of Broadcom’s ASIC customer base and programs (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Softbank/ARM, Meta, ByteDance, Alibaba, Baidu, Sambanova, xAI, Apple, etc), combined with a continued tight demand/supply outlook will mitigate any slowdown in growth due to any one customer (this has always been the ASIC business model- diversification of customers/programs reduces risk).

relationships.relationship_description: Part of Broadcom’s diverse ASIC customer base.

relationships.relationship_description: Anthropic is expected to drive revenue for Broadcom.
relationships.quantifier: double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27
relationships.original_sentence: We anticipate Anthropic and OpenAI driving double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27 with sustained revenues from ByteDance and Meta.

relationships.relationship_description: OpenAI is expected to drive revenue for Broadcom.
relationships.quantifier: double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27
relationships.original_sentence: We anticipate Anthropic and OpenAI driving double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27 with sustained revenues from ByteDance and Meta.

relationships.relationship_description: ByteDance provides sustained revenues to Broadcom.
relationships.original_sentence: We anticipate Anthropic and OpenAI driving double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27 with sustained revenues from ByteDance and Meta.

relationships.relationship_description: Meta provides sustained revenues to Broadcom.
relationships.original_sentence: We anticipate Anthropic and OpenAI driving double-digits billions of dollars for Broadcom in CY27 with sustained revenues from ByteDance and Meta.

relationships.relationship_description: Google TPU business is a significant portion of Broadcom's AI revenues.
relationships.quantifier: <45% of overall AI revenues in CY27 from 50-52% in FY26 and versus 60% in FY25
relationships.original_sentence: As a reflection of the AI customer diversification, we estimate Google TPU business will decline to <45% of overall AI revenues in CY27 from 50-52% in FY26 and versus 60% in FY25 - and that’s with total AI revenues growing to >$120B in FY27.
